# Research — Tutorial Fixture Paper

RESEARCH-STAGE fixture for the educator/tutorial mode (goal=learning). This file
is the curated source → claim/topic-facet mapping the `research.done` payload
renders per-claim provenance from, BEFORE any section is written. Each source is
one `### <citekey>` block carrying a `supports:` claim line — the unit the
learning-mode per-claim provenance render names (citekey + supported claim) at
the research hard-stop.

## Curated sources

### smith2021

- title: Sub-Quadratic Attention Scaling in Transformers
- supports: the claim that transformer attention scales sub-quadratically with
  sequence length under the proposed sparse-kernel approximation.

### jones2019

- title: A Long-Context Benchmark for Sequence Models
- supports: the claim that long-context performance must be measured on a
  dedicated benchmark rather than inferred from short-context accuracy.
